securityPolicy.title: Security Policy
securityPolicy.description: Control how the AI agent handles tool execution. Configure permission rules with last-match-wins semantics.

securityPolicy.noRules: No permission rules configured. Default rules apply (terminal commands and external tools require approval).

securityPolicy.pathPolicyDesc: Control which filesystem paths the AI agent can access. Forbidden paths are always blocked.

securityPolicy.allowedRootsDesc: Additional filesystem paths the agent is allowed to access (outside workspace).

presets.morningDesc: Daily 9:00 AM — review today's tasks and schedule
presets.morningPrompt:
[Morning Check-In]
Good morning. Please:
1. Check today's schedule and upcoming deadlines.
2. Review any reminders or follow-ups set for today.
3. Summarize today's priorities.
4. If nothing requires attention, respond with exactly `[SILENT]`.
presets.eveningPrompt:
[Evening Summary]
Good evening. Please:
1. Summarize what was accomplished today.
2. List any pending items carried over to tomorrow.
3. Note any important updates or changes.
4. If nothing requires attention, respond with exactly `[SILENT]`.

heartbeat.promptDesc: Customize what the Agent does during each check. Leave empty for default behavior.
heartbeat.promptPlaceholder: e.g. Check my to-do list and remind me of urgent tasks
